title: Silent Night, Holy Night
firstLine: Silent night, holy night, all is calm, all is bright
textAttribution: Text: Joseph Mohr, 1816; tr. John F. Young, 1863.
tuneAttribution: Tune: STILLE NACHT by Franz X. Gruber, 1818.
publicDomainBasis: Joseph Mohr (1792–1848), Franz X. Gruber (1787–1863), John F. Young (1820–1885). Text 1816, tune 1818. All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Silent night, holy night,
All is calm, all is bright
'Round yon virgin mother and Child.
Holy Infant, so tender and mild,
Sleep in heavenly peace,
Sleep in heavenly peace.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
Silent night, holy night,
Shepherds quake at the sight;
Glories stream from heaven afar,
Heav'nly hosts sing Alleluia!
Christ the Savior is born,
Christ the Savior is born!

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
Silent night, holy night,
Son of God, love's pure light;
Radiant beams from Thy holy face
With the dawn of redeeming grace,
Jesus, Lord, at Thy birth,
Jesus, Lord, at Thy birth.
